shellCommands.command: pwd && git status --short && rg "setCustomValidity|shouldUseNativeValidation" src | head -100
cat package.json | head -80; find src -maxdepth 3 -type f | head
grep -R "export type FieldRef\|interface FieldRefs\|refs?:" -n src/types | head -30; sed -n '1,100p' src/types/fields.ts 2>/dev/null || true; git diff -- src/logic/validateField.ts

python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('src/logic/validateField.ts')
s=p.read_text()
p.write_text(s.rstrip('\n')+'\n')
PY
npm run build
git diff --check && git diff --stat && git diff -- src/logic/validateField.ts

python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('src/logic/validateField.ts')
b=p.read_bytes()
print('before newline', b.endswith(b'\n'))
if not b.endswith(b'\n'):
    p.write_bytes(b+b'\n')
PY
npm run build && git diff --check && git status --short
